prompt:
A small pile of freshly harvested lettuce leaves resting in a clean tray or colander beside a hydroponic setup, with crisp cut edges and varied leaf shapes visible. The composition should make it obvious these are harvested crop leaves rather than a whole intact plant, with reservoir or raft elements softly blurred in the background.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a bright near-future hydroponics aesthetic: soft natural or greenhouse lighting, realistic leaf texture and moisture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the leaves centered and uncluttered so they read clearly as a DSPACE harvest artifact.
